title: Google Gemini 3: Generative UI & Antigravity Explained 🚀
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Google just dropped Gemini 3, and it’s no longer just a chatbot—it’s a full-scale ecosystem. 🌐

We are breaking down the massive upgrades in Google’s latest AI model. From Generative Interfaces that build UI layouts instantly to the new Gemini Assistant that acts as your personal digital manager for Google Apps.

Plus, for the developers out there, we look at Antigravity—the new system designed to plan and execute complex code changes.

What feature are you most excited to try? Let us know in the comments and Subscribe to Full Disclosure for more AI & Tech updates.
